overrides.expect: \left. \begin{array}{c} \text {Work done by the gas = shaded area = \Delta V \Delta P = \Delta Q \bigg(\frac {\Delta T}{T} \bigg)} \\ \frac {\Delta T}{T} \cdot (\text {heat needed to change V by \Delta V}) _ {\text {constant T}} \\ = \Delta V \cdot (\text {change in P when T changes by \Delta T}) _ {\text {constant V}} \\ \frac {1}{\Delta V} \cdot (\text {heat needed to change V by \Delta V}) _ {T} = T (\partial P / \partial T) _ {V}. \end{array} \right\}
overrides.new: \left. \begin{array}{c} \text {Work done by the gas = shaded area = } \Delta V \Delta P = \Delta Q \bigg(\frac {\Delta T}{T} \bigg) \\ \frac {\Delta T}{T} \cdot (\text {heat needed to change V by } \Delta V) _ {\text {constant T}} \\ = \Delta V \cdot (\text {change in P when T changes by } \Delta T) _ {\text {constant V}} \\ \frac {1}{\Delta V} \cdot (\text {heat needed to change V by } \Delta V) _ {T} = T (\partial P / \partial T) _ {V}. \end{array} \right\}
